title: Bhikkhu Nyanatusita
contentHtml:
Pali Verb Conjugation and Noun/Pronoun Declension Tables, by Bhikkhu Nyanatusita (2005; 486k)

In these meticulously organized one- and two-page printouts, Bhikkhu Nyanatusita has condensed a huge amount of helpful grammatical information. Useful for Pali students of all levels. The single zip file contains the following PDF files:

  • Pali Conjugation & Pronoun Declension Tables
  • Pali Noun Declension Table
  • Pali Pronoun Declension Table
  • Pali Verb Conjugation & Pronoun Declension Tables
  • Pali Verb Conjugation Table
[Not available in HTML]
